entries.title: Spec/CLI drift: novel-workflow-profile §5.5.3 and novel-quality-loop §6 reference future review-master CLI; preset shipped V1.39 but subcommand missing

resolution.note: Shipped creator run review-master CLI subcommand (T1), quickstart §5 updated (T4), spec amendments (T5), hermetic tests green (T6). Archive in P-last.

entries.note: stage advance --stage review runs reflection-loop, not novel-review-master. P1 wired creator run review-master to novel-review-master preset.
